title: Data Ingestion
description: The Data Ingestion module guides data engineers and analysts through the process of uploading raw source data, mapping it to the OMOP Common Data Model schema, and resolving source codes to standard vocabulary concepts. A structured pipeline approach ensures that incoming data meets quality thresholds before it is made available for cohort building and analysis.
tips: Upload a representative sample of your source data first to validate schema and concept mappings before committing the full dataset.
Review the concept mapping suggestions carefully and resolve unmapped codes before finalizing ingestion, as unmapped concepts will be excluded from standard vocabulary queries.
Keep source file naming conventions consistent across ingestion runs to simplify auditing and reprocessing when source data is corrected upstream.
Check the Jobs queue after submitting an ingestion pipeline to monitor progress and catch errors early before they propagate to downstream analyses.
